title: tapeinia lineata
intro: Tapeinia lineata, also known as the Green Passion Flower Vine or Green Passionflower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Australia and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Tapeinia lineata lie in its leaves and stems, which contain flavonoids and alkaloids that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of using Tapeinia lineata include its sedative and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. Herbal preparations of Tapeinia lineata can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, colds, and digestive issues.
